title: PipeCraft
description: adds viaducts and (pipes WIP) to minecraft
body:
**Attention!**

**This mod is not finished, missing some content and contain bugs.**

**Make sure to Backup your world!**

![Travel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/oFSFRGAj/images/78403969f06e01a839f449954a06a57ea1c02c52_350.webp)

This mod adds Viaduct pipes, inspired by the old Thermal mods.

Normal item and fluid pipes may be available in a future update.

You can place the viaducts to create a network to connect them using Viaduct Connectors, which act as start and goal points.

![Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/oFSFRGAj/images/e0eb4b8bdaa0c9b57575e2d6482ab1a09911fafa.png)

You can change the travel speed with Viaduct Boosters and detect players using Detectors.

![Detector](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/oFSFRGAj/images/c362ed559b221bac22bec9d1a16e4988e4f3b0bc.png)

Viaducts can be colored with dyes, have their light level adjusted with Glowstone Dust (only for normal Viaducts, removable with a brush), and be made solid or transparent using wool or glass.

![Colored](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/oFSFRGAj/images/9cf16c0cd6b1d9a96878fa13a50cadb4abce0e75.png)

In the menu, you can sort your connections, click on them, and travel through the network.


Shift + Right-click on a connector to open the ID screen, where you can change its ID and name.


With the booster, you can adjust the speed by right-clicking and scrolling up or down.

If you hold an item and Shift + Right-click, you can assign it to the booster so that all boosters with the same ID change speed together.
